title: Setting up Templates for CRM - Pro Plan
excerpt: We have Work OS (project) and are getting started with Sales CRM - Pro Plan. When I searched on the Templates all I saw was CRM Basic and CRM Enterprise. Where do I download the Sales CRM - Pro Plan templates so I can se…

posts.author: MRC-Fridays-1960 (Michael Richter)
posts.cookedHtml: We have Work OS (project) and are getting started with Sales CRM - Pro Plan. When I searched on the Templates all I saw was CRM Basic and CRM Enterprise. Where do I download the Sales CRM - Pro Plan templates so I can see what board templates and functionality we have access to?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MRC-Fridays-1960!

If you’ve purchased the CRM product, you should have access to the custom templates via the template store - specifically under the monday sales CRM section:

Screen Shot 2023-03-06 at 12.47.49 pm1920×1155 159 KB

Is this not the case on your end?

posts.author: MRC-Fridays-1960 (Michael Richter)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, now we have the CRM. It was not provisioned previously and it was not labeled CRM Pro Plan so I wasn’t sure if that was the licenses we had or something else.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Glad you got this sorted!
